changelog: Polish 12.6 a11y fourth-pass: cart deliveryModal and guestOrderModal show/hide handlers in js/cart.min.js now activate/deactivate window.FocusTrap on open/close (Escape closes the modal and returns focus to the previously-focused element). cart.php markup gets role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby. menu-alt.php and menu-content-info.php compositionModal markup get the same dialog roles (modal-labelledby points at #modalTitle). All five modals across the app are now keyboard-accessible.
